description: Append a single line to a note while preserving existing content
userMessage: Add a new entry to the bottom of the list in 'eval-scratch/changelog.md'. The new line should read exactly: '- 2024-04-08: Added a dry-run mode that previews changes without writing.' Append it — do not rewrite the file.

value: 2024-03-19: Fixed a crash when syncing folders with very long path names.
2024-01-12: Initial release with one-way folder sync.
- 2024-04-08: Added a dry-run mode that previews changes without writing.
